title: Annoying Effects
description: New status effects that makes it harder and more annoying to survive and explore.
body:
This mod includes 35 new status effects that makes surviving and exploring the world harder.

Most of the effects only affect players. Effects have no corresponding potions, and can only be acquired by command. (Potions may be added in future releases.) Some effects only work on client side.

`tangling_nightmare` will constantly apply random annoying effects to the player. Use the command `/effect give @s annoyingeffects:tangling_nightmare infinite 0 true` for an intendedly annoying gameplay. (If the nightmare is too much for you, try `tangling_dream` instead.)

For more infomation, see [the github repository](https://github.com/AC-Mnky/AnnoyingEffects).
